text: How many active listings do you have?
Which channels are you using? For example: Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO, direct bookings, or others?
When are you hoping to go live with Guesty? Are you aiming to start as soon as possible, in 2–4 weeks, in 1–2 months, or are you still exploring?

args.note: Required field 'go_live' deferred by user — needs Call-1 resolution.

text: How do you handle cleaning — is it done in-house by your own team, through a cleaning company, via a marketplace app like Turno, or a mix?
Could you clarify — how you manage cleaning?

args.reason: Could not resolve after one clarification: 'I work with an external cleaning team. They take care of all the turnovers.'

args.user_quote: I work with an external cleaning team. They take care of all the turnovers.
args.note: Ambiguous answer for 'cleaning_system' — flagged for Jordan to clarify.

text: For your turnover checklist: would you like to upload your own, use a Guesty template, or skip for now?
Do you use smart locks? If so, which system?

args.value: Yes, we use smart locks on all the properties.

text: For your revenue analytics, should Guesty recognize revenue on the check-in date, the check-out date, or prorated across the stay?
Do you offer a non-refundable rate option — where guests pay less but can't cancel? (I'll note your answer and flag it for your onboarding specialist Jordan to configure.)
For security on bookings: do you use Guesty's Damage Protection (Shield), collect a standard security deposit, a damage waiver, or none?
What amount do you charge? Give me a flat amount (e.g. '$300') or a percentage of the stay.
Could you clarify — the deposit amount (e.g. '$300' or '10%')?

args.reason: Could not resolve after one clarification: 'Fifty dollars.'

args.note: Ambiguous answer for 'security_deposit_amount' — flagged for Jordan to clarify.

text: When do you collect payment from guests — at the time of booking, closer to arrival, or split into two payments?
Are there any mandatory fees you charge all guests — like a late check-out fee, pet fee, or laundry fee? Note: per-property cleaning fees are handled separately. If none, just say 'none'.

subfield: We charge an cleaning fee per stay.
We charge an cleaning fee per stay.

text: Just to confirm — a We charge an cleaning fee per stay. of 85.0 (flat). Is that right?
